334.reason: [This check is insufficient to distinguish FuncDef from MainFuncDef; it may incorrectly consume tokens belonging to MainFuncDef or miss valid FuncDefs. Also, the lookahead logic doesn't properly handle all cases of FuncDef vs Decl.]
